overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a sunny suburban sidewalk, crossing a busy intersection, and continuing along the opposite side. The environment features palm trees, stucco walls, Spanish-style commercial buildings, and moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban sidewalk with yellow stucco wall and palm trees

events.description: pedestrian in white shirt walks past the camera in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a continuous yellow stucco wall

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and khaki pants walking toward camera

entered.detail: continuous yellow stucco property wall with stone pillars
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk between wall and road
tall modern office buildings visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny suburban sidewalk bordered by a yellow stucco wall on the left and a multi-lane road on the right. Palm trees provide partial shade overhead while distant city buildings are visible ahead. A pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with marked crosswalks

events.description: exits covered sidewalk area and enters open intersection crosswalk
two pedestrians cross the street ahead from left to right
black sports car and delivery truck pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner and walking across the wide intersection

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians crossing the street from left to right ahead of camera
large delivery truck with yellow trailer waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: low-rise yellow building with red tile roof and arched windows
large commercial billboard mounted above the building
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
tall metal pole with traffic signals overhanging the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and enters a wide sunlit intersection, leaving the shaded sidewalk behind. The scene opens to reveal a large yellow commercial building with a prominent billboard on the left. The character crosses the asphalt crosswalk while other pedestrians and vehicles move through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban sidewalk with continuous hedge wall

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk and continues walking along hedge-lined path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk on the opposite side of the street from the starting point

notable_agents.action: woman in gray business suit walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall green hedge growing over a beige stucco wall on the right side
wooden telephone poles lining the edge of the road
distinctive building with green roof visible down the street

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character walks along a sidewalk bordered by a tall hedge wall on the right. The environment is quieter with fewer vehicles, and wooden utility poles line the left side of the road. A woman in business attire walks past in the opposite direction as the character continues toward a distant green-roofed building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny suburban street that transitions from a shaded sidewalk through a bustling intersection and into a quieter residential stretch. It begins with the character walking beside a yellow stucco wall under the partial shade of palm trees, with distant city buildings framing the horizon. As the character turns right, the scene opens into a wide, sunlit intersection, revealing a large yellow commercial building and a prominent billboard while crossing the asphalt amidst flowing traffic and pedestrians. The camera then follows the character onto the opposite sidewalk, where the environment shifts to a quieter atmosphere bordered by a tall hedge wall and wooden utility poles. Finally, the movement continues past a woman in business attire, heading toward a distant green-roofed building under the bright sky.
